detail_desc:
This large, purpled, mohawked warrior looks quite aggressive.  It is
probably not something anyone should mess with.
long_desc: The FREC stands here looking for violence.

detail_desc:
This person is bearing up under University pressures quite well and looks as
if it can cope with anything.
long_desc: The Boss is standing here looking somewhat bored.

detail_desc:
This person is ready, and willing to help any being in trouble.  Just to top
things off, the gael is extremely well dressed.
long_desc: The Gael is here to help you.

detail_desc:
The example mob looks indistinct, as if it hasn't been completely fleshed
out yet.
long_desc: An Example Mob stands here, exampling.

detail_desc:
As you glance at the professor, it suddenly begins to scream about homework
and its spatial relationship to you.
long_desc: A professor is standing here, glaring at you.

detail_desc:
You don't want to misbehave when these guys are around.  In fact you don't
want to even be around these guys.
long_desc: Security is lurking in the area, watching for misbehavior.

detail_desc:
You don't want to misbehave when these guys are around.  In fact you don't
want to even be around these guys.
long_desc: Security is lurking in the area, watching for misbehavior.

detail_desc:
You don't want to misbehave when these guys are around.  In fact you don't
want to even be around these guys.
long_desc: Security is lurking in the area, watching for misbehavior.

detail_desc:
These are also known as StuCons and are recruited from amongst the ranks of
everyday students of the university.  They are not much more than hired help.
long_desc: A Student Constable is protecting the campus from this point.

detail_desc:
These are also known as StuCons and are recruited from amongst the ranks of
everyday students of the university.  They are not much more than hired help.
long_desc: A Student Constable is guarding the campus from this point.

detail_desc:
These are also known as StuCons and are recruited from amongst the ranks of
everyday students of the university.  They are not much more than hired help.
long_desc: A Student Constable is guarding the campus from this very point right here.

detail_desc:
This is just your average it university student, the only interests it has
are classes, work, and other its.
long_desc: The student is hurrying off to its next class.

detail_desc:
This is just your average male university student, the only interests he has
are classes, work, and other students of the opposite sex (females, you think).
long_desc: The student is rushing off to his next class.

detail_desc:
This is just your average female university student, the only interests she
has are classes, and work.
long_desc: The student is scurrying off to her next class.

detail_desc: You are looking at the everyday run of the mill confused frosh.
long_desc: This frosh is standing here with a confused expression on its face.

detail_desc: You are looking at the everyday run of the mill confused frosh.
long_desc: This frosh is standing here with a confused expression on his face.

detail_desc: You are looking at the everyday run of the mill confused frosh.
long_desc: This frosh is standing here with a confused expression on her face.

detail_desc:
With one hand he fries, with the other he flips the meat (?  ) over, and
with the other hand he sprinkles some salt into the other hand which is
holding...  Hey!  Isn't that too many hands?  This guy is good (or maybe he
isn't...  ).
long_desc: A Mary-Rotte chef struggles to poison the food quickly.

detail_desc:
This machine is a marvel of engineering.  After receiving the money, it
quickly fouls up the order and delivers it with a large clanging noise.
long_desc: A Coke Machine hums quietly.

detail_desc: You are looking at the everyday run of the mill lining-up frosh.
long_desc: This frosh is lining up here.

detail_desc: You are looking at the everyday run of the mill lining-up frosh.
long_desc: This frosh is lining up here.

detail_desc: You are looking at the everyday run of the mill confused frosh.
long_desc: This frosh is lining up here with a confused expression on her face.

detail_desc:
This large, purpled, mohawked warrior looks quite aggressive.  It is
probably not something anyone should mess with.
long_desc: The FREC waits here for violence to come to it.

detail_desc: As if you'd actually order anything.
long_desc: A caf employee stands here ready to fill your order.

detail_desc:
It (he?  ) is quite big.  It (she?  ) looks at you with undisguised
hunger...
long_desc: A rather large jock occupies the room.

detail_desc: This mosher moshes with enthusiasm!
long_desc: A mosher moshes here.  Oh it hit you!

detail_desc: This mosher moshes with enthusiasm!
long_desc: A mosher moshes here.  Oh he hit you!

detail_desc: This mosher moshes with enthusiasm!
long_desc: A mosher moshes here.  Oh she hit you!

detail_desc:
This mailbox is a staple in most of Tabrach.  Funny thing though, you've
never seen one in your life...  Hmmmm.  On the side is emblazoned the word TP
(must stand for Tabrach Post).
long_desc: A friendly mailbox waits for your mail here.

detail_desc:
This creature appears to have the body of a cow with eagle's wings...  How
strange.
long_desc: A swarm of frgos circles above the building to the west.

detail_desc: This is just your average it university student, and hey, it's sleeping too!
long_desc: A student is snoozing here.

detail_desc: This is just your average it university student.
long_desc: A student is furiously taking notes here.

detail_desc:
The man before you is tall and stocky.  He is clothed in a stone-washed pair
of jeans and a purple beret.
long_desc: Chris is drooling here.

detail_desc:
The creature before you looks EVIL and SCARY, but you being a hearty
adventurer are not afraid!  (unless you are less than 15th level ...  That is.
long_desc: The Residence Master is presiding over his little world here.

detail_desc: He seems to need help, any ideas?
long_desc: Bennie Boo is playing The World of Xeen here.

detail_desc:
His surface is a nice mixture of color and light.  It seems to be very thin
though.
long_desc: The Bubble Man is bubbling over.

detail_desc:
It looks like some kind of cross between a human and a chimpanzee...
That's odd.  Those darned elves ...  They should never have invented gene
splicing...
long_desc: A chimp-like being is doing acrobatics here.

detail_desc:
Alex is working hard at fleshing out the example mob which looks indistinct,
because it hasn't been completely fleshed out yet.
long_desc: Alex is here fleshing out the Example Mob.

detail_desc: Steve is working hard and it looks like he should be finishing soon.
long_desc: Steve is working furiously at finishing the wld file so it can be put online.

detail_desc:
As you look more closely, you realize that Bob is somewhat spaced out.
Looking at the sheet in his hand reveals that he is doing inventory.  No wonder
he is so spaced out.
long_desc: Bob is looking after his store here.

detail_desc: He seems to be locating things like candy.
long_desc: Mr. Tuck is organizing shelves.

detail_desc: Actually, there doesn't seem to be any books...  Hmmmmmm.
long_desc: Sue is looking after books here.

detail_desc:
The Bartender looks harried as he tries to keep up with several different
orders at the same time.  Maybe you should bother him later...
long_desc: The Bartender pours drinks several at a time to keep up with the rush.

detail_desc: The drunk person looks at you and slurs, 'Whatre you lookin' at, bozo?  '
long_desc: A drunk, babbling about something incessantly.

detail_desc:
It stands tall and proud...  As if being purple with golden hair can make
anyone proud...
long_desc: Chief FREC orders you around here.

detail_desc:
It looks like the student humor newspaper, but it contains nothing to do
with actual news that you didn't know already.
long_desc: A copy of Golden World lies here.

detail_desc:
The ghost resembles the late Grant Hall.  It seems to be somewhat
transparent though.
long_desc: The clock ghost flits about randomly here.

detail_desc: This ghostly creature is gray in color and has an amorphous shape.
long_desc: An ethereal wraith-like shape is here.
